title: Watchtowers Over the Reserve: Minimizing Sector Blind Spots
strategies: ranger-diagonal baseline: place every tower on the main diagonal of the reserve (matches the checker baseline, star discrepancy ~ 0.25-0.4)
irrational lattice: a rank-1 Kronecker set with generators (sqrt2, sqrt3, sqrt5) that spreads towers quasi-uniformly
best-of low-discrepancy search: evaluate several Hammersley prime-base assignments under a grid of Cranley-Patterson digital shifts and keep the point set of minimum exact star discrepancy
direct discrepancy descent: seed with a Hammersley/Halton set then locally perturb tower coordinates to shrink the worst anchored-sector gap
